notes: AS400 Outlook matching now uses Subject Contains and Lookback Days as the operational matching rules.
Sender Address is ignored for AS400 scan/import matching.
Attachment extension no longer blocks matching; Excel attachment types are accepted for import handling.
AS400 settings UI now focuses on Subject Contains, Lookback Days, and Outlook Folder.
Trace Parquet batch merge behavior from 0.2.31 is unchanged.
